reviews.comment:
Se demora muchisimo para cargar ahi. La cola es de una cuadra siempre, la espera para cargar no baja de los 20 minutos.

(Translated by Google)
It takes forever to load there. The line is always a block long, and the wait to load is never less than 20 minutes.
